name: Nicole Thornton

contactInfo.office: 101 W. Main St., Suite 350, Nacogdoches, TX 75961

bio: Nicole Thornton serves as the District Attorney for Nacogdoches County, overseeing felony prosecutions in the oldest town in Texas. She is committed to ensuring justice and public safety for all residents of Nacogdoches County.
campaignPromises: Aggressively prosecute violent and drug-related crimes
Protect the rights of crime victims
Maintain an efficient and transparent DA's office
Collaborate with Stephen F. Austin State University on campus safety
Partner with law enforcement to reduce crime
